commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes Claude CLI skill handling to omit the OpenClaw skills prompt when a Claude Code plugin can carry skills, adds regression tests for plugin and fallback cases, and updates the CLI backend docs.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +159, Docs +1. Total +193 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main builds the OpenClaw skills prompt into the CLI system prompt while the Claude CLI execution path also prepares the native skills plugin. I did not run the live Claude CLI flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This automerge replacement PR has one concrete, narrow fallback blocker that a repair pass can attempt on the PR branch.

target.title: Fix Claude CLI duplicate skills prompt
target.body:
Makes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87087 merge-ready for the ClawSweeper automerge loop.
The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.

- Cluster: automerge-openclaw-openclaw-87087
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87087

- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.
- Automerge requested by: @Takhoffman

- Repair fallback: GitHub rejected the repair branch push because it updates workflow files and the ClawSweeper app token does not have workflows permission
